response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio from 01:45 onwards phonetically matches the provided reference lyrics for 'Gyōan Exdeath'. The segment before 01:45 features a solo arrangement by Kazama Iroha, which required manual transcription. 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON was used for the main song section (01:45-02:40), but I had to manually transcribe the intro solo, the shout-outs, and the entire talk segment (03:07-04:56). Note: The Reference JSON incorrectly identified Hakos Baelz; visual inspection confirms the performers are La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, and Kazama Iroha. 3. Timing & Pacing: Applied aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions during the fast-paced song sections to prevent cascading delays. The talk segment is timed to match the energetic delivery of each performer.

subtitles.original: 一刀両断叩き斬る!
subtitles.english: I'll slice you in two!

subtitles.original: 心の寄せる ほのかな唄
subtitles.english: A faint song that draws the heart closer

subtitles.original: 花の芽になりたい 一つ突く その前より
subtitles.english: I want to be a flower bud. Even before the first strike...

subtitles.original: しっかりと 地に立ちたい 唇を 芽吹かせる
subtitles.english: I want to stand firmly on the ground and let my lips bloom.

subtitles.original: やらずの雨が降ろうと 出し抜けに 啜ることなく
subtitles.english: Even if it rains to stop me, without even a sip unexpectedly...

subtitles.original: 八百万の声を灯せば 由縁もありし日の 記録にできるから
subtitles.english: If I light up the myriad voices, I can turn fated days into a record.

subtitles.original: 涙など もう いじるのが 苦手... 咲く
subtitles.english: I'm no longer good at playing with tears... I'll bloom.

subtitles.original: 福桜を 散りまければ 愛されない 後ろめたさ も
subtitles.english: If the lucky cherry blossoms scatter, even the guilt of being unloved...

subtitles.original: 叫を 勝ち割るぐらい 身を切るぐらいに 凪を打つ 有明の 先で
subtitles.english: To the point of splitting the cry or cutting my body, I'll strike the calm at dawn.

subtitles.original: 心の寄せる ほのかな唄
subtitles.english: A faint song that draws the heart closer

subtitles.original: どうしようもない Don't show, No mine
subtitles.english: It can't be helped, Don't show, No mine

subtitles.original: 堕ちてく運命 ならしょうがない
subtitles.english: If it's our destiny to fall, then it can't be helped

subtitles.original: もう全部 塗り替えよう
subtitles.english: Let's repaint everything now

subtitles.original: 刮目せよ!!
subtitles.english: Witness this!!

subtitles.original: XとXとXとXが交差する真ん中で
subtitles.english: In the center where X, X, X, and X intersect

subtitles.original: Next Next Next 世界はもう始まってる じゃん!!!!
subtitles.english: Next Next Next, the world has already begun, right!!!!

subtitles.original: 媚びな complete now つまり最後に
subtitles.english: Don't flatter, complete now, so in the end...

subtitles.original: 笑うのはholoXです
subtitles.english: The ones laughing will be holoX

subtitles.original: holoXのライブが始まったぞー!
subtitles.english: The holoX live concert has begun!

subtitles.original: おにぎりー! こんにちはー!
subtitles.english: Onigiri! Hello everyone!

subtitles.original: 全然秘匿性のない秘密結社...
subtitles.english: A secret society with absolutely no secrecy...

subtitles.original: 自己紹介する? はい!
subtitles.english: Shall we introduce ourselves? Yes!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、狂気の宴の始まりだー!
subtitles.english: Now then, let the banquet of madness begin!

subtitles.original: 貴様ら、刮目せよ!
subtitles.english: You all, witness this!

subtitles.original: 吾輩の名前は、ラプラス・ダークネスだ!
subtitles.english: My name is La+ Darknesss!

subtitles.original: はい! 皆様、待ったー?
subtitles.english: Yes! Everyone, did you wait for me?

subtitles.original: 新しいのよ。やってくれた、みんな。
subtitles.english: This is new. You guys were great.

subtitles.original: holoXの女幹部、鷹嶺ルイと申します!
subtitles.english: I am the female executive of holoX, Takane Lui!

subtitles.original: 待った? 待った?
subtitles.english: Did you wait? Did you wait?

subtitles.original: はい! ちょっと新しいの行きますね
subtitles.english: Yes! I'm going to try something a bit new.

subtitles.original: あの子より、その子より...
subtitles.english: More than that girl, more than that girl...

subtitles.original: こよりー!
subtitles.english: It's Koyori!

subtitles.original: いけてるじゃん、すごーい! ありがとう
subtitles.english: That was cool, amazing! Thank you.

subtitles.original: holoXの頭脳、博衣こよりだよー!
subtitles.english: I'm the brain of holoX, Hakui Koyori!

subtitles.original: お前たち、わかってるよね? わかってるよね?
subtitles.english: You guys understand, right? You understand, right?

subtitles.original: ござるさんはー? かわいいー!
subtitles.english: Gozaru-san is...? She's cute!

subtitles.original: holoX好き? もう一回! ござるさんはー?
subtitles.english: Do you like holoX? One more time! Gozaru-san is...?

subtitles.original: かわいいー!
subtitles.english: She's cute!
